summary: Consolidated the separate '/sweep-design' and '/sweep-eval' workflows into a single comprehensive '/sweep' workflow. The new '/sweep' contains three phases: Phase 1 (Architectural Design) with 15 specific structural assertions covering module boundaries, dependency graphs, data flows, cross-file invariants, lifecycle, and project completeness; Phase 2 (Code Quality Evaluation) with cross-cutting checks for string constants, test fidelity, goroutine lifecycle, context propagation, and resource lifecycle; and Phase 3 (Checklist, Work & Verification). This replaces the previous split workflows with a unified two-phase analysis approach.
